check.name: clock_span_reversed_pts_enforced_by_json_schema_alone
check.note: Draft 2020-12 JSON Schema cannot natively express end_pts_exclusive > start_pts; compiler validate_clock_span_invariants remains the fail-closed authority.

schema_errors: 0 is less than the minimum of 1
end_below_schema_minimum.note: Only per-field minimum fires; this is not cross-field order enforcement.

offline_probe.conclusion: Equal and reversed PTS pairs validate under Draft202012Validator on the published clock-span field schemas; schema-alone ROW084-012 remains FAIL/HOLD.

compiler_fail_closed_authority.note: Compiler remains authoritative for reversed PTS. Schema-native clearance would invent non-Draft-2020-12 authority.

rejected_clearance_paths_this_shift.why_rejected: Non-standard extension; invents production schema authority beyond Draft 2020-12 + Draft202012Validator.
Would invent project-local production vocabulary without upstream Draft adoption.
Cannot cover unbounded integer PTS domains; would fake native coverage.
Changes data model; does not natively enforce end_pts_exclusive > start_pts on the two published fields.
Check name requires enforcement by JSON Schema alone; compiler-only PASS would be false clearance.

clearance_preconditions_if_ever_reopened: Upstream JSON Schema draft gains a standard cross-instance comparison keyword adopted by jsonschema.Draft*Validator used here, OR
Project explicitly adopts a signed schema vocabulary + validator lane as production authority (separate ADR; out of scope for this hold deepen), AND
Focused tests prove schema-alone rejection of equal/reversed PTS without compiler invariants, AND
ROW084-011 Class E remains untouched by any schema-native claim.
safe_next_action: CSV deferred. Keep ROW084-012 Class C OPEN_HOLD. Do not clear ROW084-011 Class E. Do not claim COMPLETE/row_complete. No schema-native PASS without Draft-level cross-field authority.
recommended_codex_follow_up: Leave Class C hold in place until a real Draft-native or ADR-backed validator vocabulary exists; prioritize unrelated row work or Class E production-completion criteria when authorized.
